name: Manoj Ram Mopati
right_to_work: UK Graduate visa (eligible to work in the UK without sponsorship)
profile_facts: 3+ years' commercial experience across retail, consumer goods, financial services (collections) and insurance at Infosys
Marketing Mix Modelling and trade-promotion optimisation improved profit margins 5-8% across 100+ markets/regions
RFM risk segmentation over 200K+ customers raised debt-recovery rates 14% and cut recovery time 12 days
Production ML on Azure Databricks with CI/CD, Docker, Git; recent GenAI (RAG)
MSc Data Science, Coventry University (predicted Distinction); Microsoft certified AZ-900, PL-300, DP-600

skills.Programming: Python (pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, SciPy, TensorFlow, PyTorch), SQL, PySpark, R
skills.Machine Learning & Statistics: Regression, classification, clustering, time series, NLP, GenAI / RAG, tree-based models, RFM segmentation, feature engineering, A/B testing, hypothesis testing, statistical modelling
skills.Cloud & MLOps: Azure (Databricks, Data Factory, Data Lake, Azure ML, Azure SQL, DevOps), GCP, Docker, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Git, Apache Airflow, model lifecycle management
skills.Data & BI: Power BI, DAX, Power Query, Microsoft Fabric, Tableau, Looker Studio, Excel
skills.Ways of working: Agile / Jira, data governance, data quality, stakeholder management

experience.title: Data Scientist - Infosys Limited (client: Mars Wrigley), Bangalore, India
bullets: Built Marketing Mix Models (log-log regression) on 3+ years of weekly data to quantify how media, price, promotion, seasonality and competition drove sales, validated out-of-sample (R2, MAPE).
Decomposed sales into baseline vs incremental and attributed contribution and ROI to each driver, informing multi-million-pound media and trade-spend decisions.
Fed elasticities into an OR-Tools optimiser, improving profit margins by 5-8% across 100+ markets.
Built and deployed the end-to-end ML lifecycle on Azure Databricks (Azure ML, Data Lake, DevOps, Git) with CI/CD into production.
Built a Power Apps app with Power Automate flows for Strategic Revenue Management stakeholders to capture pricing/promotion inputs and refresh Power BI reporting.
Partnered with senior stakeholders and mentored junior analysts on modelling approach, validation and code quality.

experience.title: Associate Data Scientist - Infosys Limited, Bangalore, India
bullets: Built an RFM segmentation model in Python over 200K+ customers (financial-services collections) using payment behaviour and outstanding debt to classify high-, medium- and low-risk profiles.
Designed risk-tiered debt-recovery interventions that increased recovery rates by 14% and cut average recovery time by 12 days.
Wrote complex SQL and Python for data cleansing and transformation on large datasets.
Built executive Power BI and Tableau dashboards covering customer segments, debt ageing, exposure and recovery status.

experience.title: Associate Data Analyst - Infosys Limited, Bangalore, India
bullets: Analysed 1M+ claims, policy and provider records in SQL, Power BI and Excel to surface SLA breaches, risk patterns and payment delays.
Built Power BI dashboards monitoring real-time claim risk and resolution bottlenecks for operations teams.
Partnered with cross-functional teams to present insights and support reporting and documentation.

projects.name: RAG Analytics Assistant for Business Reports
projects.text: GenAI assistant using retrieval-augmented generation (LangChain, FAISS, Streamlit) to query business reports and return source-grounded, cited summaries, with an offline evaluation harness. (github.com/ManojRam7)

projects.name: Health Insurance ML Pipeline
projects.text: medallion (Bronze-Silver-Gold) PySpark pipeline over 62K+ records training churn, fraud-risk and high-cost-claim models, with Docker and CI/CD. (github.com/ManojRam7/health_insurance_project)

projects.name: Customer Churn Prediction Service
projects.text: Random Forest churn model served via FastAPI, containerised with Docker and deployed to Azure Container Apps with GitHub Actions CI/CD. (github.com/ManojRam7/CustomerChurn_Prediction)

education.degree: MSc Data Science - Coventry University, UK
BTech Mechanical Engineering - Visvodaya Engineering College, India

certifications: Microsoft Certified - Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900), Power BI Data Analyst Associate (PL-300), Fabric Analytics Engineer Associate (DP-600)
